summary: Re-tested Issue 1 (MongoDB URI persistence) after second fix attempt. URI now correctly persists to IndexedDB and survives page reload.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Issue 1 (MongoDB URI persistence) is now FIXED. All 4 previously reported issues are resolved. The fix used loadFromDB/saveToDB directly to patch IDB core record, bypassing stale closure. Test used URI: mongodb://localhost:27017.

steps: Navigated to Settings via hamburger menu
Clicked Apply button - IDB saveToDB for indigo_app_data_core fired (confirmed in console logs)
Navigated back to Settings > MongoDB Configuration

apply_button_idb_save.detail: Console logs showed 'saveToDB key=indigo_app_data_core' twice on Apply click
